title: Raiguri's First Aid
description: This RP changes original textures of First Aid to more vanilla-like.
body:
### Raiguri's First Aid RP
Hello there, so I just redraw textures of [First Aid](https://modrinth.com/mod/firstaid) mod to more vanilla-like.

# Redrawn limb-health system
![redrawn limb-health system](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a4030f6f7ea1fb6e2c839805f5c61ed54551ffd.png)

# Redrawn items
![Redrawn items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90b012d73b7daf524f475fd203b9b2a90dafadc7.png)
